mano_cua.result_summary: Mux Elements monorepo，turbo dev 失败（mux-elements-codemod build:types 类型错误：@types/glob IOptions 不匹配）。构建链断裂导致 dev server 未启动。此外测试需要有效的 Mux playback-id（外部视频服务），纯本地无法测试视频预览功能。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Mux Elements monorepo turbo dev failed. mux-elements-codemod build:types type error broke build chain. Dev server never started. Also requires valid Mux playback-id (external service) to test video preview functionality.
